Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos. To Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Nov-18-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted itS TENTATIVE RULING WITH MODIFICATION. DEFENDANT BRIAN CORNISH'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED TO THE EXTENT IT RELATES TO ANY WAGE GARNISHMENT AND DENIED AS MOOT AS TO THE BANK LEVY. COURT TO PREPARE WRITTEN ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
*AFTER HEARING, THE COURT SIGNS WRITTEN ORDER DENYING WAGE GARNISHMENT AS THIS CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS ONLY REGARDING BANK LEVY PER YOLO COUNTY SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT*
